title: Update module github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit to v2
body:
[![Mend Renovate](https://app.renovatebot.com/images/banner.svg)](https://renovatebot.com)

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Adoption | Passing | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit](https://togithub.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit) | `v1.1.1` -> `v2.0.1` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2frootless-containers%2frootlesskit/v2.0.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![adoption](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/adoption/go/github.com%2frootless-containers%2frootlesskit/v2.0.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![passing](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/compatibility/go/github.com%2frootless-containers%2frootlesskit/v1.1.1/v2.0.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2frootless-containers%2frootlesskit/v1.1.1/v2.0.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>rootless-containers/rootlesskit (github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit)</summary>

### [`v2.0.1`](https://togithub.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/releases/tag/v2.0.1)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/compare/v2.0.0...v2.0.1)

##### Changes

-   lxc-user-nic: fix /etc/resolv.conf missing IP ([https://github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/pull/419](https://togithub.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/pull/419))

Full changes: https://github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/milestone/6?closed=1

##### Install

    mkdir -p ~/bin
    curl -sSL https://github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/releases/download//rootlesskit-$(uname -m).tar.gz | tar Cxzv ~/bin

##### About the binaries

The binaries were built automatically on GitHub Actions.
See the log to verify SHA256SUMS.
https://github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/actions/runs/7793948990
The sha256sum of the SHA256SUMS file itself is 262930950ccc1406ad75b2af45adcd9032375feaf92ade68d6ae76cdd39abd11 .

### [`v2.0.0`](https://togithub.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/releases/tag/v2.0.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/compare/v1.1.1...v2.0.0)

#### Changes

##### Support detach-netns ([https://github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/pull/379](https://togithub.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/pull/379) , thanks to [@​fahedouch](https://togithub.com/fahedouch))

The `--detach-netns` mode detaches the network namespace associated with slirp4netns, etc. into `$ROOTLESSKIT_STATE_DIR/netns`,
and executes the child command in the host's network namespace.

The child command can enter `$ROOTLESSKIT_STATE_DIR/netns` by itself to create nested network namespaces inside it for CNI, etc.

This will be used for:

-   Accelerating (and deflaking) `nerdctl (push|pull|build)`.
-   Supporting `nerdctl run --net=host`

See [https://github.com/containerd/nerdctl/pull/2723](https://togithub.com/containerd/nerdctl/pull/2723) for how nerdctl will adopt the `--detach-netns` mode.

##### New network driver: `pasta` (with port driver `implicit`) ([#​358](https://togithub.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/issues/358))

Pasta(https://passt.top/passt/) is similar to slirp4netns but its port forwarder achieves better throughput than slirp4netns port driver.
It is still not faster than RootlessKit's `builtin` port driver, but unlike the `builtin` port driver, pasta can retain source IP address information.

Network driver         | Port driver         | Net throughput | Port throughput | Src IP | No SUID | Note
\---------------|----------------|----------------|-----------------|--------|---------|-----
slirp4netns    | builtin        | Slow           | Fast ✅            | ❌     | ✅      |
slirp4netns    | slirp4netns    | Slow           | Slow            | ✅     | ✅      |
**pasta**        | **implicit**   | Slow           | Fast ✅            | ✅     | ✅      | Experimental
lxc-user-nic   | builtin        | Fast ✅           | Fast ✅             | ❌     | ❌      | Experimental
(bypass4netns) | (bypass4netns) | Fast ✅           | Fast ✅           | ✅     | ✅      | Not integrated to RootlessKit

Usage: `rootlesskit --net=pasta --port-driver=implicit`

-   No support for explicit port forwarding (`rootlessctl add-ports`),
    as pasta doesn't support it yet.
    Use `--port-driver=implicit` to let pasta forward TCP ports implicitly.
    The forwarded ports are not visible in `rootlessctl list-ports`.

-   Needs very recent version of pasta (`2023_12_04.b86afe3`)

##### Add `--print-semver=(major|minor|patch)` ([#​381](https://togithub.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/issues/381))

Full changes: https://github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/milestone/5?closed=1

#### Install

    mkdir -p ~/bin
    curl -sSL https://github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/releases/download//rootlesskit-$(uname -m).tar.gz | tar Cxzv ~/bin

#### About the binaries

The binaries were built automatically on GitHub Actions.
See the log to verify SHA256SUMS.
https://github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/actions/runs/7523006764
The sha256sum of the SHA256SUMS file itself is 86f558c55497f1df37de1f24aee3c3ac6f3231e2262ea2910362ba3f90ef534d .

</details>

---
